items.title: Cost of new Melbourne F1 Grand Prix pit building soars due to asbestos work
items.summary: The planned rebuild of a pit lane at Albert Park has blown out by millions of dollars, with Victorian taxpayers to foot the bill.

items.title: Homes Tasmania, social housing body, axed after failing to deliver on homes target
items.summary: Tasmania's state-owned public housing authority, criticised as being "hamstrung by confused decision making", gets the chop after failing to deliver on its goals in its three years of existence.

items.title: Your photos of the blood moon from around Australia

items.title: ARN Media's $200m Kyle and Jackie O experiment has failed

items.title: Middle East conflict hits meat exports, pushes up costs for farmers
items.summary: Exports have been halted and shipping containers filled with Australian meat are stranded at sea as the Middle East conflict takes a toll on trade.

items.title: Australian crisis teams sent to Middle East as Iran war continues

items.title: Cloud Carrier proposes gas-fired power station to power Moss Vale AI data centre
items.summary: A small town in the NSW Southern Highlands is watching the AI revolution take shape in its backyard, as plans emerge to build one of the state's largest gas-fired power stations to run a data-processing complex.

items.title: By striking Gulf states Iran is hitting one of Donald Trump's vulnerabilities
items.summary: Despite their immense wealth — and even their past capacity to influence the globe through their control over oil prices — the Gulf states don't have much ability to influence events in this war.

items.title: Netball teams ousted from league due to lack of footballers sparks equal opportunity complaint

items.title: Albanese government did not act on advice to halt salmon farming at Macquarie Harbour
items.summary: Former environment minister Tanya Plibersek was advised by her department to revoke salmon farming approvals in Tasmania's Macquarie Harbour amid concerns about the industry's impact on the endangered Maugean skate, FOI documents show.

items.title: Dennis Cometti, legendary sports commentator, dies aged 76

items.title: Trump says UK's Starmer is no Winston Churchill after rift over Iran strikes
items.summary: US President Donald Trump has criticised British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer over his reluctance to join the US-Israeli strikes on Iran, saying, "This is not Winston Churchill that we're dealing with."
